reach_why: It synthesizes known debates on search, fluency, and explanation rather than opening a clearly unprecedented explanatory domain.
novelty_why: It non-obviously links tractability filters with Deutschian hard-to-vary criteria and background-knowledge dependence.
falsifiable_why: Counterexamples could show models achieving explanatory novelty without vast search or human-imported background scoring.
explanation: Creativity judgments depend on hidden background knowledge; tractable fluency alone cannot distinguish novelty from shallow strangeness.
